summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Martin Lepage's AI Governance consulting landing page. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend loads and navigates properly, AI-powered assessment tool generates results successfully, contact form integrates with Resend API, and Calendly embed is functional.
passed_tests: Assessment submission with AI analysis working (/api/assessment/submit)
Homepage loads with hero section, navigation, and services preview
Services page displays AurorAI and CompassAI sections correctly
Portfolio page loads and displays case studies from API
Publications page loads and displays publications from API
Assessment tool complete workflow - question navigation, answer selection, AI analysis
Assessment results display with score, category breakdown, AI analysis, and recommendations
Contact form submission successful with success message display
Calendly widget loads in contact page
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (8/8 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (17 UI/integration tests passed)
